scope: M5 Batch 027 draft. Adds SAR coordination and casualty-transfer reinforcement: casualty counts, medical transfer, helicopter winching, on-scene coordinator role, and relay updates. Draft only; not merged into starter and not deployed.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: On-scene coordinator is a SAR role, not coast station, medical coordinator, or helicopter.
